OTP IP status flags

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x38
Size:
0x4
Source:
otpc_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:4] - - - -
[3] otp_init_done r 0x0 IP initialization complete
[2] otp_bit_lock r 0x0 individual bit-cell locked
[1] otp_pgm_lock r 0x0 entire array program-locked
[0] otp_busy r 0x0 operation in progress
